name: Davis Community Center
description: Davis Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Carroll, IL. There are 4 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water.

name: Shannon
description: Come play pickleball at Shannon in Shannon, IL! There is 1 outdoor court. The court lines are permanent. The facility includes amenities like lights.
